item.title: North Carolina abortion clinic volunteer chastises a group trying to protest at the clinic.
item.description: Posted on TikTok (10-27-2020) by reiley (@luvurmother) who captioned it: "some amazing words from our king @drewusernamenotavailable." Andrew, whose username is now @standupfightbackclt, has some killer lines to defend the patients that need to visit his local clinic.

item.title: Lotr meme dump....

1
2
3
If somw of these repet I'm sorry
Not sorry
But yeah
Thought this would bring some happiness
To some fellow nerds out there
Who might be having a hard time
Or just struggling to find some light.
Your not alone
The world seems bleak
But there's still some good
4
5
6
7
Potatoes
Don't forget
The mushrooms
AND MY AXE!
10/10
8
9
10
11
Oof
12
Choices were made
14
Not bad
Reboot
Yeet
Eagles
Hope yall enjoyed that run. Here's Lucille and Bailey. They are trouble makers. They will pay the tax (hopefully)

The Big Box Swindle by Stacy Mitchell is an extremely good and eye-opening book. Highly recommend.

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #23
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straights financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8Jqnr4SgIZ Previous fundraisers are linked on previous posts and on my profile and have raised a total of $4875.50 over the course of two months. ****EDIT - I posted this right before bed and woke up to a Most Viral! Woo-hoo, thanks guys! Also many many thanks to the four people that donated! $85 makes a huge difference, thank you, it relieves some of the pressure and stress on him which he desperately needs. Unrelated to Paul - Holy shit, y’all have some feelings about the Florida Italy swap meme. Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX 15 - https://imgur.com/gallery/59sfisF 16 - https://imgur.com/gallery/uvZueER 17 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Dmi0hX3 18 - https://imgur.com/gallery/5qbONFr 19 - https://imgur.com/gallery/yQAj164 20 - https://imgur.com/gallery/LbeSGwY 21 - https://imgur.com/gallery/ZwBrzUL 22 - https://imgur.com/gallery/nS03mai

item.title: Bad Eggs - "Ulterior Motives"

item.title: oh God -- more May the 4th stuff
item.description:
This is a 'Star Wars facts' image set that I made for Cracked back in 2019. The image borders are inspired by the old Kenner action figure packages. I thought it was cool, lol...
I worked with them 'officially' for a couple of years.. after winning a bunch of those contests they used to have.
Met a lot of really great writers and artists...
Jason Pargin aka David Wong is a great guy. Got to work one-on-one with him on a few projects.
If you remember that "14 Insane Things Happening Right Now" news series back in around 2016... that was me. Me and my partners, I mean.
By the time Cracked got to its third owners... I had had enough.
No, not because of the political leanings and all that... though writing to a specific demographic certainly throttles you....
Or because the ad bubble burst and they had to cut all the best content creators, like Dan and Cody... though that certainly was a downer.
The quality just... went... to shit...
They were just emphasizing speed over everything. Partly so they could pay less. That's why the memes they're producing now look so basic and cookie cutter.
Can't blame them though. The money just wasn't there anymore. It is what it is.
A bunch of talented people bolted. Some of my friends went to go work for Macaulay Culkin at Bunny Ears. He's a really nice guy, I'm told.
Time marches on I guess. So like I said, this set is a few years old. So some of it may feel outdated. Like calling Grogu "baby Yoda". He was so hot at the time.. they insisted I find some fact about him.
But it was all fun to make. Basically a few days of research, a couple days of Photoshopping. All in my jammies, eating cereal.
I've moved my attention more toward animation. Nothing worthwhile published yet. My 9-to-5 makes it challenge to find time.
This one was my favorite fact by the way. I totally thought it was fucking blue growing up.
Mark Hamill is a goddamn treasure.
This one sparked debate and outrage. I will concede it was a stretch. But that's how you get the clicks, baby.
Heh, Billy Dee. Batman did him wrong. At least he got to be Two Face in the Batman '89 comic books last year.
Oh, this was another favorite. The Death Star was being used as a trash can in a bar. Fucking crazy.
MJ also wanted to be Spider-Man. What a strange dude he was. Musical genius, though.
Fun image to make. I used Adobe Flash and published as a gif. We had file size limits at Cracked, so please excuse the potato quality. Anyway, happy Star Wars Day. I love this community and appreciate that you read this far down. vIrAL eDiT: You are all too kind. Feel free to hit me up for more dirt on Cracked, lol. More of my Cracked stuff: https://www.cracked.com/members/Amomaxia
item.dc:creator: amomaxia

item.title: Last of Lisa [OC]
item.dc:creator: adamtots

item.title: My body, my choice
item.description: Approximately one week following Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination in 2020 I made the decision to undergo a bilateral salpingectomy. Sterilization was something I’d considered prior to Ginsberg’s death but the possibility of conservatives gaining majority in the Supreme Court and the inevitable threat to progressive causes like women’s rights was too significant to ignore. The relief I feel is indescribable and not something I take for granted. I only wish all women were afforded the same peace of mind. Edit: Since a few people have asked, I'd like to provide some insight. Due to the very real misogyny inhibiting women's autonomy and reproductive rights, I did an immense amount of research into the various types of sterilization and medical professionals in my state to determine who wouldn't be a complete waste of time in approaching with my request. Because it's true that the majority of women asking for sterilization are denied for numerous bullshit reasons e.g. she'll change her mind, she doesn't know what she wants, she's too young, what does her husband want, well it goes against my religious beliefs etc. I was extremely fortunate to come across a local OB-GYN with extensive minimally invasive surgery experience whose provider bio emphasized the importance of including patients in medical decision-making. I scheduled a virtual appointment immediately and when the time came I made my request with zero push back. She asked my age (31) and relationship status (8-year partnership) and essentially said she had zero issues performing the surgery. Less than two months later both my fallopian tubes were removed. My insurance covered the entire procedure. I paid nothing out of pocket.
item.dc:creator: Kittensmashh

item.title: Cursed
item.dc:creator: TheJokerXX

item.title: Draft or no, this tells us where we stand. Also, LANGUAGE ALERT: I swear. A lot.
item.description:
Do not be complacent.
This is the agenda.
The Republicants have been stacking courts and gerrymandering for a long time in preparation for things like this.
Legislation will not stop abortions.
Birth control stops abortions. Sex and reproductive education stops abortions. Putting rapists in fucking jail stops abortions. Better prenatal and maternal care stops abortions. Living wages and social services stop abortions.
These assholes right here.
I cannot believe this shit is happening.
No. We're not shocked.
We're fucking angry. And we don't know what to do about it.
Assholes.
She warned us. About so much more than this. I don't care if you didn't like her. She was better than that tire fire that held office. Notice I didn't say "we elected," because that shit was bullshit. Tyranny of the minority.
How?! Just how?!
What happened to "checks and balances"? They blocked Garland to force this shit through.
All you fuckers out there who voted for DJT or didn't vote... "We didn't like the other candidate either." "We didn't think he could win." "How could this happen?"
The US is screwed. Or"rights" are based on an outdated document and a rigged system.
So many will die. Or be charged as murderers. Or yes.
It is insane to me...
that we live in this country...
where pregnancy is basically weaponized.
But mah freedumbs!
Because fuck em. That's why
Women are less than people in this country. If you didn't believe that before, this should cement it for you.
Time for an update. Seriously. It's 200+years old people!
Time for a revolution.
Time to stop this insanity where we base our rights and freedom on a 200+ year old document written by entitled old frigging white men.
Party of the assholes.
Yep. Seems accurate.
This. Until they get birthed. Then their YOUR problem.
The Dems are not without blame for this.
And they will be to blame for worse if they fail to act now.
Stop being silent because you don't want to bring attention to yourself. Stop being silent because you think it doesn't apply to you or affect you.
This isn't just about RvW.
This is about suppression and control.
Let's argue about word choice and meaning.
Just because it isn't in the constitution doesn't mean it shouldn't be. They could not have predicted everything 200+ years in the future. It should be a living document that changes as times do.
Why are we still fighting for this?
It's my body.
It's my choice.
Seriously.
Can we please have our next revolution?
Because we certainly are. This post is my vent. Don't like it? Fuck right the fuck off and then fuck off some more.
item.dc:creator: bchbum6

item.title: We're sorry.
item.description: https://www.cbc.ca/news/politics/canada-provide-abortion-access-american-women-1.6440238 Happy to see my Country doing the right thing. Keep up the fight, all you beautiful people! I suspect the fight is on our future too. Our Conservatives dream to emulate yours.
item.dc:creator: infinitynull667
